query:
UPDATE agent_inventory ai
INNER JOIN game_item_catalog ic ON ai.item_id = ic.item_id
SET ai.item_type = 'material', ai.updated_at = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
WHERE ic.category = 'scroll' AND ai.item_type = 'consumable';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute UPDATE agent_inventory ai
INNER JOIN game_item_catalog ic ON ai.item_id = ic.item_id
SET ai.item_type = 'material', ai.updated_at = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
